description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that runs a before_script on all jobs to update apt, install libnss3-tools, display the Node version, show npm version, set NPM_CONFIG_LOGLEVEL=warn, install npm dependencies and generate certificates. Cache the node_modules directory per job using a cache key of $CI_JOB_NAME. Define a single job named test:current that uses the node:latest Docker image, runs the script npm t, and inherits the before_script. The pipeline has the default test stage and no additional triggers or deployment targets.
